modules.module_title: Introduction to Hair & Scalp Anatomy, Salon Hygiene

questions.question: Hair shaft ka sabse outer layer kaun sa hai jo protection provide karta hai?

options.B: Medulla

questions.explanation: Cuticle hair shaft ka sabse outer protective layer hota hai.

questions.question: Dandruff kis scalp condition ko kehte hain?

options.B: Dry scalp with flaking

questions.explanation: Dandruff mein scalp dry ho jaata hai aur usmein se flakes nikalte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein tools ko sanitize karne ka primary reason kya hai?

options.A: Tools ko shiny rakhne ke liye
options.B: Bacteria aur viruses ko eliminate karne ke liye
options.C: Tools ki life badhane ke liye
options.D: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sanitization ka main purpose harmful microorganisms ko destroy karna hai taaki infections na phailen.

questions.question: Hair ki growth kis part se start hoti hai?

options.B: Hair root

questions.explanation: Hair growth hair root se shuru hoti hai jo scalp ke andar hota hai.

questions.question: Salon mein towels ko wash karne ke baad kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Open air mein

questions.explanation: Clean aur dry towels ko bacteria se bachane ke liye clean aur dry cabinet mein store karna chahiye.

questions.question: Hair ke elasticity ko check karne ke liye kya karte hain?

options.B: Hair ko stretch karte hain

questions.explanation: Hair ki elasticity check karne ke liye usko gently stretch karte hain aur dekhte hain ki woh kitna wapas apni original position mein aata hai.

questions.question: Salon mein personal hygiene maintain karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Infections phailne se rokne ke liye
options.C: Client se tips lene ke liye
options.D: Tools ko clean rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Personal hygiene maintain karna infections ke spread ko rokne ke liye bahut zaroori hai, client aur technician dono ki safety ke liye.

questions.question: Hair shaft ka kaun sa layer hair ko strength aur color provide karta hai?

options.B: Medulla

questions.explanation: Cortex hair shaft ka middle layer hota hai jo hair ko strength deta hai aur melanin (color pigment) contain karta hai.

questions.question: Scalp ko inspect karte waqt kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Hair color ka
options.C: Redness, lesions, ya infections ke signs ka

questions.explanation: Scalp health check karna zaroori hai kisi bhi service se pehle taaki koi underlying issue ya contraindication identify ho sake.

questions.question: Sterilization aur Disinfection mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Sterilization sabhi microorganisms ko destroy karta hai, disinfection kuch ko
options.C: Disinfection sabhi microorganisms ko destroy karta hai, sterilization kuch ko
options.D: Sterilization sirf tools par hota hai, disinfection surfaces par

questions.explanation: Sterilization mein sabhi living microorganisms, including spores, destroy ho jaate hain. Disinfection mein most but not all microorganisms kill hote hain.

questions.question: Hair porosity kis cheez ko refer karta hai?

options.B: Hair ki thickness
options.C: Hair ki moisture absorb karne ki ability

questions.explanation: Hair porosity batati hai ki hair kitni aasani se moisture aur chemical treatments ko absorb kar sakta hai. High porosity matlab easily absorb karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein blood exposure incident hone par sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Area ko clean karna aur disinfect karna
options.D: Sabse pehle client ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Blood exposure hone par immediate step hai area ko clean aur disinfect karna taaki infections ka spread roka ja sake.

questions.question: Hair texture ko kaise describe kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Hair ka diameter (fine, medium, coarse)

questions.explanation: Hair texture hair strand ke diameter ko refer karta hai, jaise fine, medium ya coarse.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ko prevent karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Ek hi towel sab clients ke liye use karna
options.B: Used tools ko immediately clean aur sanitize karna
options.D: Ek hi comb sab services ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination tab hoti hai jab germs ek surface ya person se doosre par transfer hote hain. Isse bachne ke liye tools ko har client ke baad clean aur sanitize karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hair coloring service se pehle patch test kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Client ka favorite color janne ke liye
options.B: Hair color ki quantity decide karne ke liye
options.C: Allergic reaction check karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ki length measure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test, jise predisposition test bhi kehte hain, kisi bhi allergic reaction ko pehchanne ke liye zaroori hai jo hair color chemicals se ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Alopecia areata mein hair loss ka pattern kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Circular ya irregular patches mein hair loss

questions.explanation: Alopecia areata ek autoimmune condition hai jismein hair circular ya irregular patches mein jhadte hain.

questions.question: pH scale par 7 se niche ke substances ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Neutral

questions.explanation: pH scale par 7 neutral hota hai. 7 se niche acidic aur 7 se upar alkaline ya basic hota hai.

questions.question: Hair wash karte waqt water temperature kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Bahut thanda

questions.explanation: Luke warm water hair aur scalp ke liye best hota hai, oil aur dirt ko effectively remove karta hai bina scalp ko dry kiye.

questions.question: Detangling ke liye kis type ke comb ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Tail comb

questions.explanation: Wide-tooth comb detangling ke liye best hota hai kyunki yeh hair ko break hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Blow-drying se pehle hair par kya apply karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Heat protectant serum

questions.explanation: Heat protectant serum hair ko heat damage se bachata hai jab blow-drying ya other heat styling tools use karte hain.

questions.question: Sectioning clips ka kya use hai hair styling mein?

options.A: Hair ko color karne ke liye
options.B: Hair ko different sections mein divide karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko cut karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko measure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sectioning clips hair styling mein hair ko manage karne aur different sections mein divide karne ke liye use hote hain taaki kaam easy ho.

questions.question: Round brush ka use kis styling technique mein hota hai?

options.B: Curling and adding volume during blow-dry

questions.explanation: Round brush blow-drying ke saath curls, waves aur volume add karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Hair conditioner ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Hair ko soft, smooth aur manageable banana

questions.explanation: Conditioner hair ki outer layer (cuticle) ko seal karta hai, jisse hair smooth, soft aur shiny bante hain.

questions.question: Basic three-strand braid kaise banate hain?

options.A: Hair ko two sections mein divide karke
options.B: Hair ko three equal sections mein divide karke aur cross-over karke

questions.explanation: Basic three-strand braid banane ke liye hair ko teen equal sections mein divide karte hain aur unhe alternate tarike se cross-over karte hain.

questions.question: Backcombing ya teasing ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Hair mein volume aur lift add karna

questions.explanation: Backcombing hair roots par volume aur lift create karne ki technique hai.

questions.question: Thermal styling tools (jaise straightener, curling iron) use karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: High heat setting par hamesha use karna
options.C: Heat protectant use karna aur temperature control karna

questions.explanation: Heat protectant aur appropriate temperature setting hair ko damage se bachane ke liye critical hain.

questions.question: Hair mousse ka kya function hai styling mein?

options.B: Hair ko hold, volume aur texture dena

questions.explanation: Hair mousse ek light-weight product hai jo hair ko hold, volume aur texture provide karta hai without making it stiff.

questions.question: Flat ironing karte waqt hair ko kaise sections mein divide karna chahiye?

options.B: Random sections

questions.explanation: Small, manageable sections mein divide karne se har strand ko evenly heat milti hai aur better results aate hain.

questions.question: Diffuser attachment ka use blow-dryer ke saath kab karte hain?

options.A: Hair ko straight karne ke liye
options.B: Curly ya wavy hair ko define karne aur frizz kam karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko jaldi dry karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko zyada volume dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Diffuser heat ko evenly spread karta hai, jisse curls maintain rehte hain aur frizz control hota hai.

questions.question: Wet setting techniques mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Hair ko wet karke rollers ya pins se set karna, phir dry karna

questions.explanation: Wet setting mein hair ko wet karke rollers, pin curls ya finger waves se set karte hain aur phir dry hone dete hain.

questions.question: Shampooing se pehle hair ko thoroughly wet karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Shampoo ko dilute karne ke liye
options.B: Foaming ko improve karne aur product distribution ke liye
options.C: Client ko thanda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hair ko thoroughly wet karne se shampoo evenly distribute hota hai aur achhi lather banti hai, jisse cleaning effective hoti hai.

questions.question: Hair porosity high hone par styling products kaise choose karne chahiye?

options.B: Heavy, oil-based products

questions.explanation: High porosity hair jaldi moisture lose karta hai, isliye heavy, oil-based products ya creams use karne chahiye jo moisture ko seal kar saken.

questions.question: Aisi situation mein kya karenge jab client ke hair mein bahut zyada tangles hon?

options.B: Directly shampoo apply karenge
options.C: Conditioner ya detangler apply karke wide-tooth comb se gently detangle karenge

questions.explanation: Zyada tangles hone par conditioner ya detangler use karke aur wide-tooth comb se gently detangle karna chahiye taaki hair breakage na ho.

questions.question: Blow-drying technique mein 'root lift' achieve karne ke liye kya karte hain?

options.A: Hair ko niche ki taraf blow-dry karte hain
options.B: Round brush se roots ko upar ki taraf lift karte hue blow-dry karte hain
options.C: Sirf ends par focus karte hain

questions.explanation: Root lift ke liye hair ko roots se upar ki taraf lift karte hue blow-dry kiya jaata hai, usually round brush ki help se, taaki volume add ho.

questions.question: Hair cutting mein 'blunt cut' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Hair ko layers mein cut karna
options.B: Hair ko ek hi length par straight cut karna
options.C: Hair ko curly style mein cut karna

questions.explanation: Blunt cut mein hair ko ek hi straight line mein cut kiya jaata hai, jisse ek solid, heavy look aata hai.

questions.question: Cutting cape ka kya use hai hair cutting mein?

options.A: Client ko stylish dikhane ke liye
options.B: Client ke kapdon ko cut hair se bachane ke liye
options.C: Hair ko dry karne ke liye
options.D: Client ko garam rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cutting cape client ke kapdon ko cut hair aur chemicals se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Hair cutting mein 'elevation' kis cheez ko refer karta hai?

options.B: Hair ko head se kitne angle par uthaya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Elevation hair cutting mein hair section ko head se kitne angle par lift kiya gaya hai, usse denote karta hai, jo layering ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Hair cutting mein 'guide' ya 'guideline' kya hoti hai?

options.A: Ek tool jo hair ko pakadta hai
options.B: Hair ka ek section jise refer karke baaki hair cut kiye jaate hain
options.C: Ek book jismein cutting instructions hoti hain

questions.explanation: Guideline hair ka woh pehla section hota hai jise cut kiya jaata hai, aur phir baaki hair ko uske according cut kiya jaata hai taaki uniformity rahe.

questions.question: Scissors ko sanitize karne ke liye kaun sa solution use karna chahiye?

options.B: Shampoo

questions.explanation: Scissors ko har client ke baad disinfectant solution mein clean aur sanitize karna chahiye taaki germs na phailen.

questions.question: Hair cutting mein 'overdirection' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Hair ko ek hi direction mein comb karna
options.B: Hair sections ko uski natural falling position se alag direction mein pull karna

questions.explanation: Overdirection se hair cutting mein weight distribution aur layering ko control kiya jaata hai, jisse different effects create hote hain.

questions.question: Graduated bob cut mein hair kaisa dikhta hai?

options.A: Sab hair ek hi length ke hote hain
options.B: Piche se short aur aage se long, with stacked layers

questions.explanation: Graduated bob mein piche ki taraf stacked layers hote hain jo neck par short hote hain aur aage ki taraf gradually long hote jaate hain, giving a 'graduated' effect.

questions.question: Point cutting technique ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Hair ends ko soften karna aur texture add karna
options.C: Hair ko uniform length par cut karna

questions.explanation: Point cutting mein scissors ko hair ends par point karte hue cut kiya jaata hai, jisse ends soft hote hain aur hair mein movement aur texture add hoti hai.

questions.question: Horizontal sections ka use kab karte hain hair cutting mein?

options.B: Blunt cuts aur weight lines create karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Horizontal sections se hair ko ek solid, blunt line mein cut kiya jaata hai, jo weight line create karta hai.

questions.question: Weight line ko remove karne ke liye kaun si cutting technique use karte hain?

options.B: Graduation

questions.explanation: Graduation technique mein hair ko angle par cut kiya jaata hai, jisse weight line soft ho jaati hai aur hair mein movement aati hai.

questions.question: A-line bob cut ki kya pehchan hai?

options.A: Sab hair ek hi length ke hote hain
options.B: Hair piche se short aur aage se long hote hain bina stacked layers ke
options.C: Hair mein bahut saare layers hote hain

questions.explanation: A-line bob mein hair piche se short hote hain aur aage ki taraf gradually long hote jaate hain, ek 'A' shape create karte hue, but generally without the heavy stacking of a graduated bob.

questions.question: Notching technique ka kya use hai?

options.B: Hair ends par aggressive texture create karna

questions.explanation: Notching similar hai point cutting ke, lekin ismein scissors ko zyada deeply cut karte hain hair ends par, jisse ek more textured aur jagged look aata hai.

questions.question: Undercutting technique mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Sirf top layer ko cut karte hain
options.B: Hair ke lower sections ko upper sections se significantly shorter cut karte hain
options.C: Hair ko blunt cut karte hain
options.D: Hair ko point cut karte hain

questions.explanation: Undercutting mein head ke lower ya inner sections ko top sections se bahut chhota cut kiya jaata hai, jisse ek distinct contrast aur style banta hai.

questions.question: Texturizing shears (thinning scissors) ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Volume add karna
options.C: Hair se bulk remove karna aur texture add karna

questions.explanation: Texturizing shears hair se bulk remove karne aur hair mein softness ya movement add karne ke liye use hote hain, bina length ko significantly chhota kiye.

questions.question: Convex edge scissors kis tarah ke cuts ke liye best hote hain?

options.B: Precision cutting aur slide cutting ke liye

questions.explanation: Convex edge scissors bahut sharp hote hain aur precision cutting, slide cutting aur point cutting jaise advanced techniques ke liye ideal hote hain.

questions.question: What is the primary difference between a uniform layer and a graduated layer cut?

options.A: Uniform layer mein sab hair ek hi length ke hote hain, graduated mein nahi
options.B: Uniform layer mein hair equal length par cut hote hain across the head, graduated mein angles use hote hain to build weight
options.C: Uniform layer dry hair par hota hai, graduated wet hair par
options.D: Uniform layer mein koi elevation nahi hoti, graduated mein high elevation hoti hai

questions.explanation: Uniform layer mein hair ko head par equal length par cut kiya jaata hai (90-degree elevation par). Graduated layer mein hair ko lower elevation par cut kiya jaata hai, jisse weight build hota hai aur ek stacked effect aata hai.

questions.question: Temporary hair color kitne washes tak rehta hai?

options.B: Ek wash tak

questions.explanation: Temporary hair color hair shaft ke surface par coat karta hai aur kuch washes ke baad nikal jaata hai.

questions.question: Patch test kitne ghante pehle karna chahiye hair coloring se?

options.B: 24-48 ghante pehle

questions.explanation: Patch test, ya predisposition test, coloring se 24-48 ghante pehle karna zaroori hai taaki kisi bhi allergic reaction ka pata chal sake.

questions.question: Natural hair color kis pigment par depend karta hai?

options.B: Melanin

questions.explanation: Melanin hair ka natural pigment hota hai jo hair ko color deta hai. Eumelanin dark hair ke liye aur Pheomelanin red/yellow hair ke liye.

questions.question: Developer ya Peroxide ka kya role hai hair coloring mein?

options.B: Hair color ko activate karna aur lightening provide karna

questions.explanation: Developer (hydrogen peroxide) hair color ko activate karta hai aur hair ke cuticle ko open karke color pigments ko andar jaane deta hai, aur natural pigment ko lighten bhi karta hai.

questions.question: Foil technique ka use kis liye hota hai hair coloring mein?

options.A: Pure hair ko ek hi color karne ke liye
options.B: Hair ko sections mein divide karke highlights ya lowlights apply karne ke liye
options.C: Hair ko bleach karne ke liye
options.D: Hair ko condition karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Foil technique mein hair ke small sections ko foils mein wrap karke un par color ya lightener apply karte hain taaki woh baaki hair se separate rahen.

questions.question: Grey hair ko cover karne ke liye kaun sa color type best hai?

options.B: Semi-permanent color

questions.explanation: Permanent hair color grey hair ko sabse achhe se cover karta hai kyunki yeh hair shaft ke andar penetrate karta hai aur natural pigment ko replace karta hai.

questions.question: Color wheel mein 'primary colors' kaun se hain?

options.B: Red, Yellow, Blue

questions.explanation: Red, Yellow, Blue primary colors hain jinhe mix karke baaki sab colors banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Hair coloring ke baad hair ko kis shampoo se wash karna chahiye?

options.B: Clarifying shampoo

questions.explanation: Color-safe shampoo hair color ko fade hone se bachata hai aur color ki longevity badhata hai.

questions.question: Level system hair coloring mein kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Hair color ki lightness ya darkness

questions.explanation: Level system 1 (darkest) se 10 (lightest) tak hair color ki lightness ya darkness ko measure karta hai.

questions.question: Demi-permanent hair color ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: No-ammonia formula, lasts 20-28 washes, deposit-only
options.C: Sirf hair surface par coat karta hai

questions.explanation: Demi-permanent color hair shaft mein penetrate karta hai lekin natural pigment ko lighten nahi karta, lasts for a good number of washes.

questions.question: Pre-lightening (bleaching) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Hair ke natural pigment ko remove karna taaki lighter ya brighter color apply ho sake

questions.explanation: Pre-lightening hair se natural melanin ko remove karta hai, jisse lighter shades ya vibrant fashion colors apply karna possible hota hai.

questions.question: Color correction mein 'toner' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Unwanted undertones (jaise brassiness) ko neutralize karna

questions.explanation: Toner semi-permanent color hota hai jo unwanted warm tones (yellow, orange) ko neutralize karne ke liye use hota hai, jisse desired cool tone milta hai.

questions.question: On-scalp bleaching karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Bleach ko scalp par directly apply karna
options.B: Scalp ko protect karne ke liye barrier cream use karna
options.D: Bleach ko hair roots par zyada der tak chhodna

questions.explanation: On-scalp bleaching se pehle barrier cream use karna scalp ko irritation aur burns se bachata hai.

questions.question: Warm tones (red, orange, yellow) ko neutralize karne ke liye color wheel mein kaun se colors use karte hain?

options.B: Cool tones (blue, green, violet)

questions.explanation: Color wheel par opposite colors ek doosre ko neutralize karte hain. Warm tones ko cool tones neutralize karte hain.

questions.question: Client ke hair mein previous chemical treatment (jaise perm) ho toh coloring kaise adjust karenge?

options.B: Normal procedure follow karenge
options.C: Mild formula ya lower volume developer use karenge, ya service postpone karenge

questions.explanation: Chemically treated hair zyada porous hota hai aur damage-prone hota hai, isliye mild formula ya lower volume developer use karna ya service ko postpone karna wise hai.

questions.question: Band-aid method (color correction) kya hota hai?

options.B: Hair ke small sections ko light ya dark karke overall color ko balance karna
options.C: Pure hair ko ek hi color se cover karna

questions.explanation: Band-aid method mein hair ke specific areas ko selectively lighten ya darken kiya jaata hai taaki overall color imbalance ko correct kiya ja sake, jaise stripes ko blend karna.

questions.question: Hair coloring mein 'filler' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Hair ki porosity ko equalize karna aur missing primary colors ko replenish karna

questions.explanation: Fillers hair ki porosity ko equalize karte hain aur missing primary colors ko replenish karte hain, especially jab hair ko lighter se darker shade mein le ja rahe hon, taaki color result even aur natural aaye.

questions.question: Updo hairstyle banane ke liye kaun se tools commonly use hote hain?

options.B: Curling iron, bobby pins, hair spray

questions.explanation: Updos mein hair ko upar ki taraf style kiya jaata hai, jiske liye curls, pins aur strong hold spray ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Hair spray ka kya main function hai finishing mein?

options.B: Hair ko shine dena aur hold provide karna

questions.explanation: Hair spray styled hair ko hold karta hai aur uski longevity badhata hai, aur shine bhi add kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Curling iron use karte waqt hair ko kis direction mein curl karna chahiye taaki natural look aaye?

options.B: Sirf face se away
options.C: Alternate directions mein ya face se away

questions.explanation: Face se away curl karne se open look aata hai, aur alternate directions mein curl karne se natural, beachy waves effect milta hai.

questions.question: Texturizing spray ka kya use hai hair styling mein?

options.B: Hair ko matte finish aur volume dena

questions.explanation: Texturizing spray hair ko hold, volume aur ek tousled, matte finish deta hai, jaise 'beach waves' ke liye.

questions.question: Ponytail ko zyada volume dene ke liye kya technique use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Ponytail ke base par backcombing karna

questions.explanation: Ponytail ke base par backcombing karne se lift aur volume milta hai, jisse ponytail fuller dikhti hai.

questions.question: Braid styles mein 'Dutch braid' aur 'French braid' mein kya main difference hai?

options.A: Dutch braid mein strands upar se cross hote hain, French braid mein niche se
options.B: French braid mein strands upar se cross hote hain, Dutch braid mein niche se
options.C: Dutch braid mein sirf do strands hote hain, French braid mein teen

questions.explanation: French braid mein hair sections ko ek doosre ke upar cross kiya jaata hai, jabki Dutch braid mein hair sections ko ek doosre ke niche cross kiya jaata hai, jisse braid 'pop out' hoti hai.

questions.question: Hair extensions apply karne se pehle kya preparation zaroori hai?

options.B: Hair ko clean aur dry rakhna

questions.explanation: Hair extensions ko properly bond karne ke liye hair clean aur dry hone chahiye, taaki product achhe se adhere kare.

questions.question: Crimping iron ka kya use hai?

options.B: Hair mein zig-zag texture ya 'crimps' create karna

questions.explanation: Crimping iron hair mein small, uniform zig-zag patterns create karta hai, jisse ek unique textured look aata hai.

questions.question: Hair bun ko secure karne ke liye kaun se tools sabse effective hain?

options.B: Bobby pins aur U-pins

questions.explanation: Bobby pins aur U-pins bun ko tightly aur discreetly secure karne ke liye best hote hain.

questions.question: Sleek ponytail banane ke liye kya technique use karte hain?

options.B: Hair ko smooth karke, gel ya serum apply karke tight baandhna

questions.explanation: Sleek ponytail ke liye hair ko achhe se comb karke, flyaways ko gel ya serum se control karke tight aur smooth baandhte hain.

questions.question: Bridal hairstyle mein 'padding' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Hairstyle mein volume aur support add karna

questions.explanation: Padding (donut buns, hair nets mein artificial hair) use karte hain taaki updos aur intricate styles mein extra volume aur structure mil sake.

questions.question: Finger waves kaise create kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Fingers aur comb ka use karke wet hair mein waves form karna

questions.explanation: Finger waves ek classic wet setting technique hai jismein fingers aur comb ki help se wet hair mein S-shaped waves banate hain.

questions.question: Hair extensions ko maintain karne ke liye kya advice denge client ko?

options.A: Zyada heat styling use karne ko
options.B: Regularly brush karne ko, tangles avoid karne ko aur special products use karne ko
options.C: Extensions ko roz wash karne ko
options.D: Extensions ko ghar par hi remove karne ko

questions.explanation: Extensions ko longevity aur good condition mein rakhne ke liye proper brushing, gentle washing aur suitable products ka use zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hair accessories (tiaras, flowers) ko hairstyle mein kaise secure karte hain?

options.B: Bobby pins, U-pins, ya small clips ka use karke hair mein fix karna

questions.explanation: Hair accessories ko secure karne ke liye pins aur clips ka use karte hain taaki woh hairstyle mein stable rahen.

questions.question: A-line bob par soft waves create karne ke liye kaun si technique best hai?

options.A: Tight curls with small curling iron
options.B: Large barrel curling iron ya flat iron se soft bends create karna

questions.explanation: A-line bob par soft waves ke liye large barrel curling iron ya flat iron se loose bends create karna best hai, jisse style ki sharpness maintain rahe aur softness bhi aaye.

questions.question: Client ke fine, thin hair mein volume create karne ke liye kya advanced technique use karenge?

options.A: Hair ko bahut zyada straighten karna
options.B: Root lifting products, backcombing, aur strategic layering/cutting

questions.explanation: Fine, thin hair mein volume ke liye root lifting products, gentle backcombing aur cutting techniques jaise layering ya blunt cutting ka combination effective hota hai.

questions.question: Aisi situation mein kya karenge jab client ki party hairstyle ko long-lasting banana ho lekin hair bahut slippery hon?

options.A: Sirf light hold hairspray use karenge
options.B: Hair ko pre-texturize karenge (dry shampoo, texturizing spray) aur strong hold products use karenge

questions.explanation: Slippery hair ko hold dene ke liye dry shampoo ya texturizing spray se grip add karte hain, aur phir strong hold hairspray ya gel se style ko secure karte hain.

questions.question: Client consultation ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Client ki needs, expectations aur hair history ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Effective consultation se technician client ki preferences, lifestyle aur hair condition ko samajh kar best service suggest kar pata hai.

questions.question: Client consultation ke waqt kya questions puchhne chahiye?

options.B: Unki age, aur unka income
options.C: Unki hair history, styling routine, aur desired look

questions.explanation: Hair history, past chemical treatments, current styling habits aur desired outcome janana zaroori hai ek successful service ke liye.

questions.question: Salon mein customer service ka ek important aspect kya hai?

options.A: Sirf service jaldi se finish karna
options.B: Client ko comfortable feel karana aur unki complaints ko address karna

questions.explanation: Good customer service mein client ko listen karna, unki needs ko understand karna aur unki satisfaction ensure karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Appointment booking system ka kya benefit hai salon ke liye?

options.B: Client wait time kam karna aur schedule ko manage karna
options.C: Zyada clients ko ek saath service dena

questions.explanation: Appointment system se salon ka schedule efficient rehta hai aur client ko zyada wait nahi karna padta.

questions.question: Client ko aftercare products recommend karte waqt kya dhyaan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unke hair type, service aur budget ke according products recommend karna
options.D: Sirf woh products jo salon mein available hon

questions.explanation: Personalized recommendations client ki satisfaction badhate hain aur unke hair health ko maintain karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein stock management kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf products ko count karne ke liye
options.B: Products ki availability ensure karne, wastage kam karne aur costs manage karne ke liye
options.C: Staff ko busy rakhne ke liye
options.D: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective stock management se salon smoothly chalta hai, products ki shortage nahi hoti aur unnecessary expenses avoid hote hain.

questions.question: Client ki specific needs ko samajhne ke liye kaun si communication skill sabse important hai?

options.B: Active listening

questions.explanation: Active listening ka matlab hai client ko poori tarah sunna aur unki baat ko samajhna, jisse unki needs ko sahi se address kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar client apne desired look ke baare mein unsure ho, toh technician ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apni marzi se koi bhi style bana dena
options.B: Questions puchhna, reference photos dikhana aur options suggest karna

questions.explanation: Client ko guide karna aur options provide karna unhe decision lene mein help karta hai aur unki satisfaction badhata hai.

questions.question: Client retention ke liye kya strategy use karni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf naye clients par focus karna
options.B: Excellent service provide karna, follow-up karna aur loyalty programs offer karna

questions.explanation: Client retention ka matlab hai existing clients ko wapas aane ke liye encourage karna, jo good service aur incentives se achieve hota hai.

questions.question: Salon mein conflict resolution (jaise client dissatisfaction) kaise handle karenge?

options.B: Client ki baat patiently sunna, apology offer karna aur solution propose karna
options.D: Manager ko bula lena bina sune

questions.explanation: Conflicts ko professional tarike se handle karna client relationships ko maintain karne aur salon ki reputation ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein retail products ko effectively promote karne ka kya tarika hai?

options.B: Service ke dauran products use karna aur unke benefits explain karna
options.C: Client ko force karna buy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ko live demo dena aur product ke benefits explain karna unhe purchase karne ke liye encourage karta hai.

questions.question: Feedback forms ka kya importance hai salon management mein?

options.B: Services aur staff performance ko improve karne ke liye valuable insights collect karna

questions.explanation: Client feedback salon ko apni strengths aur weaknesses ko samajhne mein help karta hai, jisse services aur overall experience improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar client hair color ke result se dissatisfied ho, toh technician ka pehla reaction kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Client ki concerns ko sunna aur possible solutions discuss karna
options.D: Unhe dusre salon mein jaane ko kehna

questions.explanation: Client dissatisfaction ko calmly aur professionally handle karna zaroori hai. Unki baat sunna aur solution offer karna trust build karta hai.

questions.question: Salon mein emergency situations (jaise power cut, medical emergency) ke liye kya plan hona chahiye?

options.B: Emergency contact numbers, first-aid kit aur evacuation plan ready hona chahiye

questions.explanation: Emergency preparedness salon staff aur clients ki safety ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein 'realistic expectations' set karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Client ko discourage karne ke liye
options.B: Client ki dissatisfaction ko avoid karne aur achieve hone wale results clear karne ke liye
options.C: Service ko short karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf technician ki choice batane ke liye

questions.explanation: Agar client ke expectations unrealistic hon, toh unhe pehle hi clear karna zaroori hai ki kya possible hai aur kya nahi, taaki baad mein disappointment na ho.

questions.question: Salon mein ethical practices ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Honesty, integrity aur client ki safety aur satisfaction ko prioritize karna

questions.explanation: Ethical practices mein professional conduct, transparency, client ke best interest mein kaam karna aur high standards maintain karna shamil hai.
